name: Tiramisu (Light)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add first six ingredients to the food processor and process until smooth. Set aside.
2. Mix hot water with instant espresso coffee granules. Split ladyfingers lengthwise. Dip 20 ladyfinger halves, cut side down, in the espresso mixture. Place them on the bottom of a 9-inch square baking dish. Repeat with remaining ladyfingers. Spread cheese mixture evenly over the ladyfingers. Repeat layering with more ladyfingers, espresso, and cheese. Cover with plastic wrap.
3. Refrigerate for 3-8 hours. Remove toothpicks and sprinkle with cocoa.
